scope: Diagnostic review of prayers currently assigned to ANG in the Book of Needs tradition taxonomy. This records source-basis classification only; it does not retag prayers or change runtime behavior.
conclusion: The ANG bucket contains explicitly Anglican material, Anglican divines, Anglican-tradition service prayers, and several broader Western devotional/vesting prayers that are not intrinsically Anglican-exclusive. The count should not be treated as twenty-five equally Anglican-specific prayer sources.

explicit-bcp.meaning: Source is explicitly The Book of Common Prayer.

anglican-divine.meaning: Source is Richard Hooker or Lancelot Andrewes / Andrewes tradition.

anglican-tradition.meaning: Source is labeled Anglican Tradition and should remain provisionally ANG pending deeper source review.

western-shared-devotional.meaning: Source is traditional/broad Western devotional material and is not Anglican-exclusive.

western-shared-vesting.meaning: Source is traditional Western vesting material. It may be used in Anglican/Anglo-Catholic contexts but is not intrinsically Anglican-exclusive and is role-sensitive.

entries.title: Prayer of Humble Access
entries.sourceBasis: The Book of Common Prayer, p. 337
entries.notes: Explicit BCP source; ANG assignment is source-honest.

entries.title: Act of Spiritual Communion
entries.notes: Traditional spiritual communion prayer is broadly Western/devotional rather than intrinsically Anglican. Keep current assignment until broader Western/common handling exists.

entries.title: Thanksgiving After Communion
entries.sourceBasis: Adapted from Richard Hooker, Of the Laws of Ecclesiastical Polity, 1593
entries.notes: Hooker is a major Anglican divine; ANG assignment is source-honest.

entries.title: Self-Oblation
entries.notes: Andrewes is a major Anglican divine; ANG assignment is source-honest.

entries.title: Commendation
entries.notes: Andrewes source; ANG assignment is source-honest.

futureRecommendations: Do not treat the ANG count as twenty-five equally Anglican-specific source units.
Retain runtime assignments for now because no broad-Western or Anglo-Catholic source bucket exists in the current valid taxonomy.
Before expanding role-aware Book of Needs material, classify Western vesting prayers by access tier rather than leaving them as ordinary default devotional prayers.
If a future Western/shared taxonomy is added, review spiritual-communion and the six Traditional (Western) vesting prayers for possible reassignment or multi-tagging.
